privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task operating on a local FreeScout helpdesk system. The task requires creating a saved reply named 'Password Reset Instructions' in the 'IT Support' mailbox. The expected body content must include all six required phrases: 'password.company.com', 'Forgot Password', 'employee ID', 'verification code', 'minimum 12 characters', and 'extension 4357'. The task setup creates the mailbox and establishes a baseline saved reply count; the verifier scores based on: correct name (25 pts), correct mailbox association (20 pts), presence of required content phrases (45 pts), and verification that the reply was created during the task session (10 pts). The task passes if the score is at least 65 points and the exact name match is found.
